name: Spot The Difference Wild West
description: Spot the Difference: Wild West takes you on a thrilling journey through dusty towns, desert landscapes, and classic cowboy scenes where your observation skills are put to the test—compare two nearly identical images and find all the hidden differences before time runs out! Feeling stuck? Use hints to reveal tricky spots and keep your adventure going.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to spot and tap the differences
